name: Agrian Agronomic Data API
what_it_does: Agrian (Telus Agriculture) agronomic data REST API for crop protection product management, application records, and regulatory compliance. Enables AI agents to manage pesticide and crop protection application records for EPA/state regulatory compliance, handle product label data and approved use parameters for agronomic compliance automation, access soil sampling and nutrient management data for precision agriculture workflows, retrieve field mapping and zone management data for site-specific application automation, manage agronomic recommendation records for crop advisor workflow automation, handle restricted-use pesticide (RUP) application documentation for state compliance, access tank mix compatibility and rate calculation for spray application automation, retrieve resistance management and stewardship tracking for IPM compliance, manage FSMA Produce Safety Rule food safety records for direct market growers, and integrate Agrian with precision ag platforms, applicator equipment, and ERP systems.
use_cases: Recording pesticide applications from compliance agents
Managing crop protection labels from agronomic recommendation agents
Tracking nutrient applications from precision agriculture agents
Documenting food safety records from FSMA compliance agents
not_for: Organic operations without conventional pesticide use
best_when: A commercial farm, crop consultant, or agricultural retailer wanting AI agents to automate pesticide application recordkeeping, label compliance verification, nutrient management, and regulatory documentation for state and federal agronomic compliance.
avoid_when: EPA RESTRICTED-USE PESTICIDE COMPLIANCE: Automated RUP application records must be maintained for 2 years per EPA requirements; automated recordkeeping without certified applicator license verification creates federal pesticide law violation risk. State pesticide recordkeeping — automated application records must comply with state-specific timing and content requirements (varies by state); automated records missing required data elements create state department of agriculture compliance exposure. Worker Protection Standard — automated records of pesticide applications must include correct restricted entry interval (REI) and early entry worker PPE requirements; incorrect REI in automated records creates WPS violation and farmworker safety risk. FSMA produce safety — automated recordkeeping for direct market growers must maintain required sanitation and water testing records; automated records without required elements create FDA inspection failure risk.

auth.notes: Agrian uses OAuth 2.0. REST API with JSON. Fresno, California HQ. Founded 2006. Acquired by TELUS Agriculture (2021). Part of TELUS Corporation (TSX/NYSE: T). Crop protection data management and agronomic compliance. 5,000+ farm and retailer customers. Label data library for 60,000+ crop protection products. Competes with Conservis and Climate FieldView for agronomic compliance data.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-user or per-acre annual subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription; per-user and enterprise pricing
pricing.notes: Fresno, California. TELUS Agriculture subsidiary (acquired 2021). TELUS Corporation TSX/NYSE. Founded 2006. 5,000+ customers. Crop protection compliance focus.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented per enterprise agreement

known_agent_gotchas: EPA RESTRICTED-USE PESTICIDE RECORDS: Automated RUP application records require certified applicator license verification before recording; automated records without license validation create federal FIFRA violation risk; verify applicator certification status in workflow

Worker Protection Standard REI enforcement — automated application records must embed correct restricted entry interval; incorrect REI creates farmworker safety risk and WPS violation; always validate REI against current label data in automated workflows

State pesticide recordkeeping variance — pesticide application record requirements vary significantly by state; automated records must be validated against state-specific requirements, not just federal baseline

FSMA produce safety record completeness — automated food safety records for direct market growers must include water testing, sanitation, and training records; incomplete automated records create FDA inspection failure
TELUS acquisition integration — Agrian acquired by TELUS Agriculture (2021); verify current API stability and roadmap within TELUS ecosystem; product strategy may have evolved post-acquisition
No webhooks — application record completion and compliance event notifications require polling; no push for agronomic data change or label update alerts
agent_readiness.security_notes: Agronomic compliance. SOC2. OAuth2. US/CA. Pesticide application and crop protection data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Agronomic compliance. SOC2. OAuth2. US/CA. Pesticide and crop protection records.
